macros.token: #if str($repeat.software_cond.input) != "None" #set $at_least_one_input="T" #set $first_id = re.sub('[^\s\w\-]', '_',str($repeat.software_cond.input[0].element_identifier)).replace(" ", "_").replace(":", "_") mkdir -p '${software_dir}/results_${first_id}' && #for $file in $repeat.software_cond.input: if head -n 1 '$file' | grep -qE "^pos[[:space:]]+3p"; then ln -s '$file' '${software_dir}/results_${first_id}/3pGtoA_freq.txt' ; elif head -n 1 '$file' | grep -qE "^pos[[:space:]]+5p"; then ln -s '$file' '${software_dir}/results_${first_id}/5pCtoT_freq.txt' ; elif head -n 5 '$file' | grep -qE "^Std|^\+"; then ln -s '$file' '${software_dir}/results_${first_id}/lgdistribution.txt' ; fi ; #end for #end if
